payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark reddish-brown mahogany wooden chair back with ornate carved scrollwork and circular cutouts, glossy polished finish; lower seat and front legs are partially visible and the object is edge-cropped on the sides — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
